name: Plains Peach"honey
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the peaches and remove the pits. Mash the fruit thoroughly. Measure.
Add 1-3/4 cups of light brown sugar (packed down) to each 2 cups of peach pulp. Set over very low heat until the sugar has dissolved and the peaches have released some of their juice. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat and let simmer, stirring frequently to prevent scorching, for about 30 minutes, or until the mixture is thick and clear. Seal in hot sterilized jars.
2. Excellent with biscuits, pancakes, waffles, and similar items.
